ddls:
CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "country_code" TEXT /* ISO country code */,
  "country_population" INTEGER /* Population of the country */,
  "country_gdp" REAL /* GDP of the country */,
  "country_political_stability_index" REAL /* Political stability index of the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "region_population" INTEGER /* Population of the region */,
  "region_gdp" REAL /* GDP of the region */,
  "region_political_stability_index" REAL /* Political stability index of the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "attack_types" (
  "attacktype_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each attack type */,
  "attacktype_name" TEXT /* Name of the attack type */,
  "attacktype_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the attack type */,
  "attacktype_prevalence" REAL /* Prevalence of the attack type globally */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attacktype_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "targets" (
  "target_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each target */,
  "target_name" TEXT /* Name of the target */,
  "target_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the target */,
  "target_importance" TEXT /* Importance or significance of the target */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("target_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "terrorist_groups" (
  "group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each terrorist group */,
  "group_name" TEXT /* Name of the terrorist group */,
  "group_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the terrorist group */,
  "group_founding_year" INTEGER /* Year the group was founded */,
  "group_ideology" TEXT /* Ideological beliefs of the group */,
  "group_strength" INTEGER /* Estimated strength or size of the group */,
  "group_leadership" TEXT /* Information about the group's leadership */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "target_types" (
  "targtype_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each target type */,
  "targtype_name" TEXT /* Name of the target type */,
  "targtype_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the target type */,
  "targtype_prevalence" REAL /* Prevalence of the target type globally */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("targtype_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weapon_types" (
  "weaptype_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weapon type */,
  "weaptype_name" TEXT /* Name of the weapon type */,
  "weaptype_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the weapon type */,
  "weaptype_prevalence" REAL /* Prevalence of the weapon type globally */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("weaptype_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "incident_summaries" (
  "summary_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each summary */,
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the incident */,
  "summary_text" TEXT /* Text of the summary */,
  "summary_source" TEXT /* Source of the summary (e.g., news article, intelligence report) */,
  "summary_confidence_level" TEXT /* Reliability of the summary data (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("summary_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "incident_casualties" (
  "casualty_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each casualty record */,
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the incident */,
  "nkill" INTEGER /* Number of killed */,
  "nwound" INTEGER /* Number of wounded */,
  "casualty_type" TEXT /* Type of casualty (e.g., civilian, military, law enforcement) */,
  "casualty_age_range" TEXT /* Age range of the casualties */,
  "casualty_gender" TEXT /* Gender of the casualties */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("casualty_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "incident_locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location record */,
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the incident */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the incident location */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the incident location */,
  "location_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the location */,
  "location_population" INTEGER /* Population of the location */,
  "location_political_stability_index" REAL /* Political stability index of the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "incident_dates" (
  "date_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each date record */,
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the incident */,
  "iyear" INTEGER /* Year of the incident */,
  "imonth" INTEGER /* Month of the incident */,
  "iday" INTEGER /* Day of the incident */,
  "date_source" TEXT /* Source of the date information (e.g., news article, intelligence report) */,
  "date_confidence_level" TEXT /* Reliability of the date data (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("date_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "incident_motives" (
  "motive_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each motive record */,
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the incident */,
  "motive" TEXT /* Motive behind the attack */,
  "motive_source" TEXT /* Source of the motive information (e.g., news article, intelligence report) */,
  "motive_confidence_level" TEXT /* Reliability of the motive data (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("motive_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "incident_references" (
  "reference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reference */,
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the incident */,
  "reference_text" TEXT /* Text of the reference */,
  "reference_source" TEXT /* Source of the reference (e.g., news article, intelligence report) */,
  "reference_confidence_level" TEXT /* Reliability of the reference data (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reference_id")
)
